0.name: Four Noble Truths: Abbreviated SN 56 Texts
0.description: Abbreviated suttas from the Sacca-saṁyutta (SN 56) teaching the Four Noble Truths in condensed form, directed at those with little dust in their eyes.

1.name: Eleven-Factored Teachings (Ekadasaka Nipāta)
1.description: Abbreviated Aṅguttara Nikāya texts from the Book of Elevens (AN 11), presenting condensed teachings enumerated in groups of eleven factors.
